G1-main-menu.note: Clean title screen with richer background.

G4-canvas-painted.note: Battlefield renders; terrain clean, props tinted.

G5-deploy-cost.note: Deployed recruit visible (now with RFL glyph).

G8-victory.note: VICTORY card with Play Again / Main Menu.

G11-build-placement-ring.note: Green placement ring, deck ducked to slim bar.

G13-dead-part-visible.note: Destroyed part listed at 0 HP while targeting.

G15-menu-clean.note: No points badge / no hints on the main menu.

G16-build-deck-ducks.note: Deck collapses to a slim placement bar.

G17-action-pace-setting.note: Settings has Slow / Default / Fast action speed.

G18-unit-glyphs.note: Each unit carries a legible, role-coloured type tag — RCN / MRK / HVY / TNK / ART / MTR / GRN / RFL — instantly distinguishing types (and enemy units too) from the tactical camera.

G19-prop-tint.note: Crates/sandbags/pillars now carry the Ironworks map's cool grey-blue cast so they fit the scene; glowing signal props (fuel/ammo/conduit) stay vivid.
